az: Eli aciq olanin qazanci cox olar.
ru: U shchedrogo mastera pribyli bol'she.
en: The generous craftsman earns more.
tr: Eli acik olanin kazanci cok olur.

az: Musterini aldatmaq en boyuk gunahdir.
ru: Obmanyvat' pokupatelya — velichayshiy grekh.
en: Deceiving the customer is the greatest sin.
tr: Musteriyi aldatmak en buyuk gunahtir.

az: Usta isini yarimciq qoymaz.
ru: Master ne brosayet rabotu na polputi.
en: A master never leaves work half done.
tr: Usta isini yarim birakmaz.

az: Hesabi temiz olanin uzu ag olar.
ru: U togo, chey schyot chist, sovest' chistaya.
en: Clean accounts make a clear conscience.
tr: Hesabi temiz olanin yuzu ak olur.

az: Esnaf dukanini elinin isigi dusen yerde acar.
ru: Remeslennik otkryvayet lavku tam, gde ruka dayot svet.
en: The artisan opens shop where the hand brings light.
tr: Esnaf dukanini elinin isigi dusen yerde acar.

az: Sagirde elm oyreden ustanin elinden tutan olar.
ru: Uchenik, obuchayushchiy mastera, podderzhivayet yego ruku.
en: The apprentice who teaches the master holds his hand.
tr: Ciraga ilim ogreten ustanin elinden tutan olur.

az: Halal qazan, haram yemek — Ahilik yasasi.
ru: Zarabatyvay chestno, ne yesh' zapretnogo — zakon Akhi.
en: Earn honestly, consume nothing forbidden — Akhi law.
tr: Helal kazan, haram yeme — Ahilik yasasi.

az: Tacirin sozu seneddir.
ru: Slovo torgovtsa — yego dogovor.
en: A merchant's word is their contract.
tr: Tacirin sozu senettir.

az: Nemeti israf eden bereketsiz qalar.
ru: Rastochitel'nyy ostayyotsya bez blagosloveniya.
en: The wasteful remain without blessing.
tr: Nimeti israf eden bereketsiz kalir.

az: Hesabsiz bazara cixan evine eli bos doner.
ru: Kto idyot na bazar bez schyota — vozvrashchayetsya s pustymi rukami.
en: Go to market without numbers, return empty-handed.
tr: Hesapsiz pazara cikan evine eli bos doner.

az: Temeli mohkem olan bina yuz il dayanar.
ru: Zdaniye s krepkim fundamentom prostoit sto let.
en: A building with strong foundation stands a hundred years.
tr: Temeli saglam olan bina yuz yil dayanir.

az: Ahi teskilatinda hesab kitabi aciq olar.
ru: V organizatsii Akhi kniga schyotov otkryta.
en: In the Akhi order, the ledger is always open.
tr: Ahi teskilatinda hesap defteri acik olur.

az: Usta sagirdini terk etmez, sagird de ustasina xeyanet etmez.
ru: Master ne brosit uchenika, a uchenik ne predast mastera.
en: Master won't abandon apprentice, apprentice won't betray master.
tr: Usta ciragini terk etmez, cirak da ustasina ihanet etmez.

az: Esnaf en yaxsi malini one qoyar, pis mali gizletmez.
ru: Remeslennik vystavlyayet luchshiy tovar vpered, ne pryachet plokhoy.
en: The artisan puts best goods forward, never hides the poor.
tr: Esnaf en iyi malini one koyar, kotuyu gizlemez.

az: Adil is bolgusu esnafin arasinda nifaqi aradan qaldirar.
ru: Spravedlivoye razdeleniye truda ustranyayet razdory mezhdu remeslennokami.
en: Fair division of labor removes discord among craftsmen.
tr: Adil is bolusmesi esnaf arasindaki nifaki kaldirir.

az: Gozunu ac, qulaqlarini da — bazar danisir, sen dinle.
ru: Otkroy glaza i ushi — rynok govorit, ty slushay.
en: Open your eyes and ears — the market speaks, you listen.
tr: Gozunu ac, kulaklarini da — pazar konusuyor, sen dinle.

az: Esnaf mehellesine faydali olmalidir — restoran da etrafa deyer qatmalidir.
ru: Remeslennik dolzhen byt' polezen soyedu — restoran tozhe dolzhen dobavlyat' tsennost'.
en: An artisan must benefit the neighborhood — a restaurant must add value.
tr: Esnaf mahallesine faydali olmalidir — restoran da cevrresine deger katmalidir.

az: Halal qazanc vergisini vermeye utanmaz.
ru: Chestnyy zarabotok ne styditsya platit' nalogi.
en: Honest earnings are never ashamed to pay tax.
tr: Helal kazanc vergisini vermekten utanmaz.

az: Esnaf sufresine qoydugu yemeyin arxasinda durar.
ru: Remeslennik stoit za kazhdym blyudom na svoyom stole.
en: The craftsman stands behind every dish on their table.
tr: Esnaf sofrasina koydugu yemegin arkasinda durur.

az: Ilk musterine gosterdiyin hormet sonuncu musterine de catmalidir.
ru: Uvazhenie k pervomu klientu dolzhno doytii do poslednego.
en: Respect shown to the first customer must reach the last.
tr: Ilk musterine gosterdigin saygi son musterine de ulasmalidir.

az: Muqavileye sadiq olan uzun omurlu is qurar.
ru: Vernyy dogovoru stroit dolgoye delo.
en: One faithful to contracts builds lasting business.
tr: Sozlesmeye sadik olan uzun omurlu is kurar.

az: Yaxsi usta aletini temiz saxlar, yaxsi sahibkar hesabini.
ru: Khoroshiy master derzhit instrument v chistote, khoroshiy khozyain — schyota.
en: A good master keeps tools clean, a good owner keeps books clean.
tr: Iyi usta aletini temiz tutar, iyi isletmeci hesabini.

az: Qonagin gozu sufrende, sahibkarin gozu hesabdadir.
ru: Glaz gostya na stole, glaz khozyaina — v knige.
en: The guest's eye is on the table, the owner's eye is on the ledger.
tr: Konugun gozu sofrada, isletmecinin gozu hesaptadir.

az: Az qazanib cox saxlayan, cox qazanib israf edenden zengindir.
ru: Tot, kto malo zarabotayet, no berezhet — bogache togo, kto mnogo zarabotayet i razbazarivayet.
en: One who earns little but saves is richer than one who earns much and wastes.
tr: Az kazanip cok biriktiren, cok kazanip israf edenden zengindir.

az: Keyfiyyetsiz is ucuz da olsa bahadir.
ru: Nekachestvennoye delo dorogo, dazhe yesli deshevo.
en: Poor quality work is expensive even when cheap.
tr: Kalitesiz is ucuz da olsa pahalidir.
